title: Pin/test Python client dependency ranges for TUI and dashboard
description: Discovered during project-LICHEN-py4c.1.3 architecture review. python/pyproject.toml uses broad lower bounds such as textual>=0.80.0, starlette>=0.35, and aiocoap>=0.4.7 while the current lock resolves much newer packages. aiocoap transport code also uses private aiocoap internals, and the dashboard loads HTMX from an unpinned CDN. Establish tested dependency ranges or pins for Textual/Rich, aiocoap, Starlette, and HTMX/offline dashboard behavior; update uv.lock and CI checks. No hardware required.
notes:
Implementation evidence for dependency pinning/offline dashboard: python/pyproject.toml now uses tested bounded ranges for aiocoap, anyio, Starlette, uvicorn, PyNaCl, structlog, cbor2, Textual, Rich, cryptography, filelock, and dev tooling; uv.lock regenerated and lock metadata is checked by tests. Dashboard HTML no longer loads HTMX from unpkg/htmx.org and uses an inline local hx-get polling subset for current cards. CI Python job installs uv, runs uv lock --check, uv sync --locked --all-extras --dev, scoped Ruff for the dashboard/dependency-owned paths, and full pytest under the CI Python matrix. Follow-ups created: project-LICHEN-py4c.1.16.1 for Starlette TestClient/httpx deprecation warning, project-LICHEN-py4c.1.16.2 for restoring full-project Ruff CI coverage after historical baseline cleanup, project-LICHEN-py4c.1.16.3 for local Python 3.14/macOS full-suite timeout/out-of-scope failures.
Commands run: cd python && uv lock => resolved 70 packages; cd python && uv run pytest tests/test_packaging.py tests/dashboard/test_dashboard.py -q => 31 passed, 1 StarletteDeprecationWarning; git diff --check => passed; cd python && uv run pytest tests/tui/test_native.py tests/dashboard/test_dashboard.py tests/client/test_ip_coap.py tests/coap/test_transport.py tests/coap/test_udp_server.py tests/sim/test_api.py tests/sim/test_server.py -q => 169 passed, 1 StarletteDeprecationWarning; cd python && uv run pytest tests/tui tests/client tests/dashboard tests/test_packaging.py -q => 113 passed, 1 StarletteDeprecationWarning; cd python && uv run ruff check src/lichen/dashboard tests/dashboard tests/test_packaging.py pyproject.toml => All checks passed; cd python && uv lock --check && uv sync --locked --all-extras --dev && uv run ruff check src/lichen/dashboard tests/dashboard tests/test_packaging.py pyproject.toml && uv run pytest tests/test_packaging.py tests/dashboard/test_dashboard.py tests/interface/meshtastic/test_zephyr_unsupported_portnums.py -q => lock/sync/ruff passed, 32 passed, 1 StarletteDeprecationWarning; cd python && uv run pytest tests/interface/meshtastic/test_zephyr_unsupported_portnums.py -q => 1 passed; cd python && uv run pytest tests/tui/test_native.py tests/dashboard/test_dashboard.py tests/client/test_ip_coap.py tests/coap/test_transport.py tests/coap/test_udp_server.py tests/sim/test_api.py tests/sim/test_server.py tests/test_packaging.py tests/interface/meshtastic/test_zephyr_unsupported_portnums.py -q => 176 passed, 1 StarletteDeprecationWarning; git diff --check => passed. Negative/limited evidence: cd python && uv run mypy src/lichen/dashboard tests/dashboard tests/test_packaging.py failed on pre-existing/unrelated untyped aiocoap and dashboard test helper issues; cd python && uv run ruff check src tests failed with 73 historical Ruff errors, and uvx --from ruff==0.3.7 ruff check src tests also failed with 167 historical errors; cd python && uv run pytest -q --timeout=120 --timeout-method=thread --maxfail=1 timed out locally on macOS/Python 3.14 after reaching 82 percent.
Code review evidence: Boole follow-up review reported no P0/P1/P2 findings; validation repeated uv lock --check, uv sync --locked --all-extras --dev, scoped Ruff, and dashboard/packaging/Meshtastic pytest with 32 passed/1 warning. Peirce follow-up review reported no P0/P1/P2 findings; noted residual scoped Ruff debt tracked by project-LICHEN-py4c.1.16.2 and Starlette warning tracked by project-LICHEN-py4c.1.16.1. Descartes follow-up review reported no P0/P1/P2 findings; residual local full-suite Python 3.14/macOS issues tracked by project-LICHEN-py4c.1.16.3 and inline dashboard polling implements only the hx-get/load/every subset currently used.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware scope: pinned/tested Python client dependency ranges, regenerated uv.lock, added uv lock/sync CI enforcement, removed dashboard HTMX CDN dependency with offline polling tests, fixed the Meshtastic POSITION_APP test oracle discovered by broader validation, recorded reviews and test evidence, and filed follow-ups for remaining out-of-scope Ruff/full-suite/deprecation work.
